removed.name: NNK
removed.reason: NNK α-hydroxylation primarily by CYP2A6/2A13, not CYP3A4

removed.name: nicotine
removed.reason: CYP2A6 handles 70-80% via 5'-hydroxylation → cotinine. CYP3A4 not significant.

removed.name: N_nitrosonornicotine
removed.reason: CYP2A6 primary for 5'-hydroxylation; CYP3A4 does 2'-OH at different site

site_corrected.name: zileuton
site_corrected.reason: CYP3A4 exclusively does sulfoxidation; ring hydroxylation is CYP1A2/CYP2C9

flagged_minor_pathway.name: mianserin
flagged_minor_pathway.reason: CYP2D6/CYP1A2 are dominant; CYP3A4 minor contributor

flagged_minor_pathway.name: hydromorphone
flagged_minor_pathway.reason: UGT-mediated glucuronidation dominant; CYP role minimal
